## CrankBoy

Third party consumer of the Homebrew Hub API. The developers of CrankBoy elect not to have a CrankBoy-specific homebrew tag, so generic `thirdparty` tag should be used to allow access for CrankBoy (or open source).

[CrankBoy](https://github.com/crankboyhq/crankboy-app) is a Game Boy (and CGB) emulator for the Panic [Playdate](https://play.date/).

Point of Contact: [CrankBoy's website](https://crankboy.app/) links to various methods.

Terms: Clients of the API will allow users to download ROMs for marked submissions into their local ROM library. The clients will also display metadata for apropriately marked submissions; including the provided screenshots, description, and licensing information.

List of Clients: CrankBoy.
